name: Flatten Nested Arrays
description: Use UNNEST to explode a JSON array of line items into a relational table

checks.name: fact_invoice_lines has 6 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_invoice_lines;
checks.description: Total line items: INV-001 (2) + INV-002 (1) + INV-003 (3) = 6

checks.name: INV-003 has 3 line items
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_invoice_lines WHERE invoice_id = 'INV-003';
checks.description: INV-003 has 3 products: Keyboard, USB Hub, Mouse

checks.name: Customer C1 total revenue = 1244.92
checks.query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(line_total), 2) AS total FROM fact_invoice_lines WHERE customer_id = 'C1';

checks.name: Laptop line_total = 999.99
checks.query: SELECT line_total FROM fact_invoice_lines WHERE invoice_id = 'INV-001' AND product = 'Laptop';
